data.Modification: Removal of initiator methionine from protein N-terminus, then acetylation of the new N-terminus
Iodoacetamide derivative/Addition of Glycine/Addition of G

project.title: Roles of PRDM1 in human NK-cell differentiation and activation
project.projectDescription: Key regulatory roles of PRDM1 in human NK-cell differentiation and activation
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: Immunoprecipitation, reduced with dithiothreitol (DTT), and then alkylated with iodoacetamide (IAA), followed by trypsin digestion.
project.dataProcessingProtocol: The data were search using Comet against the human database, followed by PeptideProphet on TPP.

submitters.title: Dr
submitters.affiliation: The University of Texas Health Science Center at Houston
submitters.name: Van-An Duong

references.referenceLine: Liu X, Shi Y, Zhang J, Shetty K, Chew K, Küçük C, Gong Q, Esmeray E, Li H, Chen R, Pan S, Dąbrowska K, Moore RE, Garcia-Mansfield K, Pirrotte P, Wang J, Li Y, Dong G, Lee L, McKeithan TW, Iqbal J, Chan WC. Key regulatory roles of PRDM1 in human NK-cell differentiation and activation. Leukemia. 2026 40(1):199-210
